items.title: Nano Banana 2
items.shortDescription: Nano Banana 2 is Google's new state-of-the-art image generation and editing model
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.08** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **12** times. 2K and 4K outputs will be charged at **1.5** times and **2** times the standard rate, respectively. 0.5K (512px) resolution outputs will be charged at **0.75** times the standard rate. If web search is used, an additional $0.015 will be charged. If high thinking is used, an additional $0.002 will be charged. **Note: Pricing is subject to change.**

items.title: Nano Banana Pro
items.shortDescription: Nano Banana Pro is Google's new state-of-the-art image generation and editing model
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.15** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **7** times. 4K outputs will be charged at double the standard rate. If web search is used, an additional $0.015 will be charged. Note: Pricing may change in the future.

For **$1.00**, you can run this model **12** times. 2K and 4K outputs will be charged at **1.5** times and **2** times the standard rate, respectively. 0.5K (512px) resolution outputs will be charged at **0.75** times the standard rate. If web search is used, an additional $0.015 will be charged. If high thinking is used, an additional $0.002 will be charged. **Note: Pricing is subject to change.**

items.title: FLUX.1 [schnell]
items.shortDescription: FLUX.1 [schnell] is a 12 billion parameter flow transformer that generates high-quality images from text in 1 to 4 steps, suitable for personal and commercial use.
items.billingMessage: Images are billed by rounding up to the nearest megapixel.

items.title: Nano Banana Pro
items.shortDescription: Nano Banana Pro is Google's new state-of-the-art image generation and editing model
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.15** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **7** times. 4K outputs will be charged at double the standard rate. If web search is used, an additional $0.015 will be charged. Note: Pricing may change in the future.

items.title: FLUX.1 [dev]
items.shortDescription: FLUX.1 [dev] is a 12 billion parameter flow transformer that generates high-quality images from text. It is suitable for personal and commercial use.
items.billingMessage: Images are billed by rounding up to the nearest megapixel.

items.title: Kling Video v3 Image to Video [Pro]
items.shortDescription: Kling 3.0 Pro: Top-tier image-to-video with cinematic visuals, fluid motion, and native audio generation, with custom element support.
items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of video you generated, you will be charged **$0.112** (audio off) or **$0.168** (audio on), if voice control is used while generating audio you will be charged **$0.196**. For example, a 5s video with audio on and voice control will cost **$0.98**

items.title: Nano Banana
items.shortDescription: Google's famous original image generation and editing model
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.039** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **25 times.**

items.title: Bytedance
items.shortDescription: A new-generation image creation model ByteDance, Seedream 4.5 integrates image generation and image editing capabilities into a single, unified architecture.

items.title: Flux 2 Pro
items.shortDescription: Image editing with FLUX.2 [pro] from Black Forest Labs. Ideal for high-quality image manipulation, style transfer, and sequential editing workflows
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.03** for the first megapixel of output, plus **$0.015** per extra megapixel of input and output, rounded up to the nearest megapixel. For example, a **1024x1024** image will cost **$0.03**, and a **1920x1080** image will cost **$0.045** (**$0.03** for first megapixel + **$0.015** for the second megapixel). Similarly, a **512x512** output will cost **$0.03** (**$0.03** for **0.25** megapixels, rounded to **1** megapixel)

items.title: Seedance 2 Image to Video
items.shortDescription: ByteDance's most advanced image-to-video model. Animate still images into cinematic video with synchronized audio, start and end frame control, and motion prompts.
items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.3024/second**. Your request will cost $0.014 per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.

items.title: FLUX1.1 [pro]
items.shortDescription: FLUX1.1 [pro] is an enhanced version of FLUX.1 [pro], improved image generation capabilities, delivering superior composition, detail, and artistic fidelity compared to its predecessor.
items.billingMessage: Images are billed by rounding up to the nearest megapixel.

items.title: FLUX.1 Kontext [pro]
items.shortDescription: FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] handles both text and reference images as inputs, seamlessly enabling targeted, local edits and complex transformations of entire scenes.

items.title: Grok Imagine Image
items.shortDescription: Edit images precisely with xAI's Grok Imagine model
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.022** per image (**$0.02** for image output + **$0.002** for image input).

items.title: GPT-Image 1.5
items.shortDescription: GPT Image 1.5 generates high-fidelity images with strong prompt adherence, preserving composition, lighting, and fine-grained detail.
items.pricingInfoOverride:
Your request will cost different amounts based on the number of images, quality, and size.

- You will be charged $0.005 per 1,000 input text tokens. One word is roughly 4 tokens.
- You will be charged $0.008 per 1,000 input image tokens. One 1024x1024 image is roughly 135 tokens in low fidelity mode, or 3,050 tokens in high fidelity mode.
-  You will be charged $0.010 per 1,000 output text tokens. The model will consume tokens reasoning about your prompt based on it's complexity.
- For **low** quality, you will be charged $0.009 for 1024x1024 or $0.013 for any other size *per image*. 
- For **medium** quality, you will be charged $0.034 for 1024x1024, $0.051 for 1024x1536 and $0.050 for 1536x1024 *per image*.
- For **high** quality, you will be charged $0.133 for 1024x1024, $0.200 for 1024x1536 or $0.199 for 1536x1024 *per image*.

items.title: Flux 2 Pro
items.shortDescription: Text-to-image generation with FLUX.2 [pro] from Black Forest Labs. Optimized for maximum quality, exceptional photorealism and artistic images.
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.03** for the first megapixel of output, plus **$0.015** per extra megapixel of input and output, rounded up to the nearest megapixel. For example, a **1024x1024** image will cost **$0.03**, and a **1920x1080** image will cost **$0.045** (**$0.03** for first megapixel + **$0.015** for the second megapixel). Similarly, a **512x512** output will cost **$0.03** (**$0.03** for**0.25** megapixels, rounded to **1** megapixel)

items.title: Nano Banana
items.shortDescription: Google's famous original image generation and editing model
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.039** per image. For **$1.00**, you can run this model **25 times.**

items.title: Seedance 2 Reference to Video
items.shortDescription: ByteDance's most advanced reference-to-video model. Generate video from up to 9 images, 3 videos, and 3 audio clips with native audio and cinematic camera control.
items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.3024/second**. Your request will cost $0.014 per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * ( input duration + output duration) * 24) / 1024. **If video inputs are provided the price is multiplied by 0.6**. With video inputs and 720p resolution the price is **$0.1814** per second.

items.title: FLUX.1 [dev] with LoRAs
items.shortDescription: Super fast endpoint for the FLUX.1 [dev] model with LoRA support, enabling rapid and high-quality image generation using pre-trained LoRA adaptations for personalization, specific styles, brand identities, and product-specific outputs.
items.billingMessage: Images are billed by rounding up to the nearest megapixel.

items.title: Kling Video v2.6 Image to Video
items.shortDescription: Kling 2.6 Pro: Top-tier image-to-video with cinematic visuals, fluid motion, and native audio generation.
items.pricingInfoOverride: Videos generated without audio cost $0.07 per second. Videos with native audio cost $0.14 per second, and videos with native audio and voice control cost $0.168 per second. For example, a 5-second video with audio costs $0.70, while a 10-second video with audio and voice control costs $1.68

items.title: Grok Imagine Video
items.shortDescription: Generate videos from images with audio using xAI's Grok Imagine Video model.
items.pricingInfoOverride: A 6s 480p video will cost **$0.302** (**$0.05** per second of 480p video + **$0.002** for image input). At an output resolution of 480p, every second costs **$0.05**, and at 720p, every second costs **$0.07**.

items.title: SeedVR2

items.title: Grok Imagine Image
items.shortDescription: Generate highly aesthetic images with xAI's Grok Imagine Image generation model.

- You will be charged $0.005 per 1,000 input text tokens. One word is roughly 4 tokens.
-  You will be charged $0.010 per 1,000 output text tokens. The model will consume tokens reasoning about your prompt based on it's complexity.
- For **low** quality, you will be charged $0.009 for 1024x1024 or $0.013 for any other size *per image*.

items.pricingInfoOverride: For **5s** video your request will cost **$0.35**. For every additional second you will be charged **$0.07.**

items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.3034/second**. Your request will cost $0.014 per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.

items.title: Veo 3.1 Fast
items.shortDescription: Generate videos from your image prompts using Veo 3.1 fast.
items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of video you generate you will be charged **$0.10** without audio or **$0.15** with audio for 720p or 1080p. At 4k, you will be charged **$0.30** per second without audio, or **$0.35** with. For example, a **5 second video** at **1080p** with **audio on** will cost **$0.75**.

items.title: Kling Video v3 Image to Video [Standard]

items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of video you generated, you will be charged **$0.084** (audio off) or **$0.126** (audio on), if voice control is used while generating audio you will be charged **$0.154**. For example, a 5s video with audio on and voice control will cost **$0.77**

items.title: Bria RMBG 2.0

Trained exclusively on licensed data for safe and risk-free commercial use. Model weights for commercial use are available here: https://share-eu1.hsforms.com/2GLpEVQqJTI2Lj7AMYwgfIwf4e04

items.title: Z-Image Turbo
items.shortDescription: Z-Image Turbo is a super fast text-to-image model of 6B parameters developed by Tongyi-MAI.

items.title: Bytedance
items.shortDescription: Generate videos with audio with Seedance 1.5 (supports start & end frame)
items.pricingInfoOverride: Each 720p 5 second video with audio costs roughly **$0.26**. For other resolutions, 1 million video tokens with audio costs **$2.4**. Without audio, the price is **1.2** per millition tokens. tokens(video)  = (height x width x FPS x duration) / 1024.

items.title: Bytedance Seedream v4 Edit
items.shortDescription: A new-generation image creation model ByteDance, Seedream 4.0 integrates image generation and image editing capabilities into a single, unified architecture.

items.title: Birefnet Background Removal

items.title: Seedance 2.0 Fast Image to Video
items.shortDescription: ByteDance's most advanced image-to-video model, fast tier. Lower latency and cost with synchronized audio, start and end frame control, and motion prompts.
items.pricingInfoOverride: For every second of 720p video you generated, you will be charged **$0.2419/second**. Your request will cost **$0.0112** per 1000 tokens. The number of tokens is given by (height of output video * width of output video * duration * 24) / 1024.

items.title: Ideogram Text to Image
items.shortDescription: Generate high-quality images, posters, and logos with Ideogram V3. Features exceptional typography handling and realistic outputs optimized for commercial and creative use.
items.pricingInfoOverride: Your request will cost **$0.03** with TURBO, **$0.06** with BALANCED, and **$0.09** with QUALITY.

items.title: Topaz
items.shortDescription: Use the powerful and accurate topaz image enhancer to enhance your images.
items.pricingInfoOverride: For a single image, your request will cost **$0.08** for up to **24MP**, **$0.16** for up to **48MP**, **$0.32** for up to **96MP**, and up to **$1.36** for **512MP** output resolution.
